parents.subject: LU-17914 lnet: Fix erroneous net set error

commit.subject: LU-17963 llite: get timestamps in an accurate way
commit.message:
LU-17963 llite: get timestamps in an accurate way

To protect utimes() operation from being ignored unexpectly,
set timestamps with ktime_get_real_seconds() instead of
current_time().
Add debug message in mdd_fix_attr to identify this case.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanityn
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-hsm
Test-Parameters: testlist=replay-vbr
Signed-off-by: Lei Feng <flei@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I82fa055c88829410a0c01b85a92c2c2d4c679cb4
